reviews.author: John Habura
reviews.title: Good Dropbox to Office 365 migration experience
reviews.text: The experience was a good one. I had a tight timeline to migrate Dropbox into our Office 365 SharePoint/OneDrive environment. We had CloudFuze manage our migration by purchasing the services. The communication was good even though the team was on the opposite side of the world. We were able to pivot and get the migration to complete within a few weeks. I would use the product again.

reviews.author: Office Manager
reviews.title: Super user friendly migration software
reviews.text: The software is SUPER user friendly and literally takes a few clicks to get the migration started and the customer service is amazing as well. I have been working with Raju Burnwal and Poli Ravi who have been amazing at keeping me updated throughout the migration process.

reviews.author: Product Specialist
reviews.title: Great Dropbox to OneDrive transfer service
reviews.text: This service is really great, I have a requirement for transferring all my Dropbox business files to OneDrive. This product really handled it well and really great support team.

reviews.author: Verified User
reviews.title: Easy process and very quick migration
reviews.text: Easy Process and very quick. The sales representative was very helpful and nice to work with on this project. I like that the software vetted the information before the actual implementation took place.

reviews.author: Verified User
reviews.title: Best Google Drive migration solution
reviews.text: I did some extensive research on Google Drive migration solutions, and CloudFuze offered the best solution for my migration project's needs.

reviews.author: Verified User
reviews.title: Responsive team that worked to get it right
reviews.text: The CloudFuze team was very responsive and worked to get it right. One thing that we really liked about the service was how easy it was to retrieve logs.

reviews.author: Verified Reviewer
reviews.title: Very communicative team throughout migration
reviews.text: The CloudFuze team was very communicative and kept us informed at every stage. Our account manager was a quick email or phone call away. The support experience was superior compared to our previous migration provider.

reviews.author: Verified User
reviews.title: Cost-effective specialized migration service
reviews.text: Our MSP quoted 10x higher for the same migration work. CloudFuze's specialized expertise delivered better results at a fraction of the cost. The value proposition is unmatched in the cloud migration space.

reviews.author: Verified Customer
reviews.title: Successful Slack to Teams migration
reviews.text: We like the product! The migration was a success! Customer Service follow up was great!

reviews.author: Verified Reviewer
reviews.title: Data integrity exceeded expectations
reviews.text: The end result of both the first migration and delta migration exceeded my expectations 10 fold. Considering the sensitivity of the data that was being moved, we did not lose any integrity or run into any sort of permissions or versioning issues with the files.

reviews.author: Sales & Business Development
reviews.title: Seamless ShareFile to Google migration
reviews.text: We engaged CloudFuze to help us with our ShareFile to Google migration. It was very important that we had all our files from the past twenty years transferred seamlessly without any issues or missing files. CloudFuze was able to help us with this goal. They were very cost effective and provided excellent service and support by every member of the CloudFuze Team I interacted with.

reviews.author: IT Professional
reviews.title: Complex ShareFile migration handled expertly
reviews.text: We engaged CloudFuze to assist with a complex Citrix ShareFile to Citrix ShareFile migration, which was occurring due to an acquisition. The migration consisted of hundreds of thousands of files and folders, with a difficult permission structure in place. CloudFuze was able to migrate the data and permissions from the source to the destination, and worked very hard to ensure the project was a success.
